rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: High fuel/energy consumption indicates efficiency losses.
suggestedActions: Regular maintenance improves overall equipment efficiency.
Simulate real-world driving conditions for accurate range estimates.
